channel.title: Python on Shehao Li
channel.description: Recent content in Python on Shehao Li

item.title: Auto Load-Off Test
item.description: Python automation tool for AWG + oscilloscope validation flows with validation, logging, retry/timeout handling, and CSV/MAT export.

item.title: DingTalk To-Do Creator from Email
item.description: Email-to-task automation pipeline that extracts structured workflow data from IMAP mailboxes, creates DingTalk To-Dos, and preserves idempotent processing state.

item.title: Test Automation MultiTimer
item.description: Supplementary Python Tkinter GUI for timed DMM monitoring over VISA/SCPI with interval sampling, logging, and optional MAT export.
